description: Create a follow-up letter for patient Maria Santos in FreeMED. The letter should be dated 2025-01-15 with the subject "Hypertension Follow-Up Plan". The letter body must contain: "Dear Maria Santos, This letter confirms your follow-up plan for hypertension management. Please continue taking your prescribed medication and monitor your blood pressure daily. Maintain a low-sodium diet and engage in at least 30 minutes of moderate exercise most days of the week. Return for a follow-up visit in 4 weeks. If you experience severe headaches, chest pain, or blood pressure readings above 180/120, seek immediate medical attention. Sincerely, Dr. Smith". Save the letter to the patient's record. Log in with username: admin, password: admin.
